normalizedListingStateReason: Authenticated approvalLabel is 'Listing under review' and statusLabel is 'not listed'. Not inferred from numeric approval codes alone.

preparedListingCopy.description: RepoDiet accepts bounded repository-maintenance tasks, locks the exact scope in a machine-readable contract, performs conservative changes on an isolated branch, independently verifies the result and delivers a review-ready GitHub pull request with a signed Green PR attestation and receipt.

a2mcp.name: RepoDiet Quick Triage
a2mcp.description: Bounded repository triage returning up to five prioritized findings.

a2a.name: RepoDiet Verified Cleanup PR
a2a.settlement: A2A task agreement, escrow, delivery, buyer acceptance and release
a2a.description: Customized repository cleanup delivered as a review-ready GitHub pull request.
a2a.note: Do not publish temporary test task prices as the normal public A2A price. A2A is not an A2MCP x402 pay-per-call listing.

ownerConfirmationRequired: No marketplace resubmit while under_review. After approval, confirm before any activate republish or profile/service copy update.
